improvements.proposal: Instruct implementor to keep IaC parameter constraints aligned with runtime behavior and avoid over-restrictive allowed-values unless required by acceptance criteria.
improvements.reason: Code review found that a single-value allowed list for TRAPI auth scope conflicted with runtime support for custom scopes.

improvements.proposal: Require template tests to locate resources by stable identifiers (type/name) rather than array index positions.
improvements.reason: Resource ordering in compiled ARM templates can change and create brittle tests.

improvements.proposal: Explicitly ask for at least one verification method per acceptance criterion and mark criteria requiring deployment-time checks as manual if no integration environment exists.
improvements.reason: Key Vault reference resolution can only be fully validated post-deployment, not by static unit tests alone.

improvements.proposal: When introducing new environment-driven settings, require explicit handling of blank values and corresponding regression tests.
improvements.reason: Code review highlighted that TRAPI_AUTH_SCOPE may be set but empty, which should safely fall back to the default scope.
